title: War Must Stop: "Get off this command and control architecture"
description:
Sam Pitroda outlines his vision to "Redesign the World" away from a "command and control architecture" that merely focuses on power grabbing and profits over the general welfare of the whole population. 
View Sam Pitroda's entire speech here: https://youtu.be/VLpRK_XU6hE?t=1935
View the conference in its entirety: https://bit.ly/3rzmY4R
Read and sign our petition calling for a new International Security Architecture: https://bit.ly/3pQiQwh
